competitors.name: Datadog
competitors.keyDifference: Cloud SaaS with per-host pricing; ServerMonitor is self-hosted with a lightweight tray agent and native DB2 database awareness
competitors.notes: Leading cloud-native SaaS monitoring. 800+ integrations, APM, log management, security. Generic database integration (no native DB2 focus)

competitors.name: Zabbix
competitors.keyDifference: Extremely powerful but complex setup requiring PostgreSQL/MySQL and extensive configuration; ServerMonitor is simpler with tray agent and built-in DB2 awareness
competitors.notes: Enterprise-class open-source monitoring. Agent-based and agentless, auto-discovery, alerting, dashboards. Trusted by Fortune 500. No license fees

competitors.name: PRTG Network Monitor
competitors.keyDifference: Sensor-based pricing that scales per metric; lacks native DB2 awareness. ServerMonitor offers flat-cost self-hosted with DB2 as first-class resource
competitors.notes: All-in-one monitoring. 680+ built-in sensor types, auto-discovery, alerting, dashboards. Free tier with 100 sensors. On-premise and cloud options

competitors.name: Nagios XI
competitors.pricing: From $2,495 (one-time license); Nagios Core is free
competitors.keyDifference: Dated UI and requires plugin management for DB2; ServerMonitor provides modern web dashboard with built-in DB2 health checks
competitors.notes: Original open-source monitoring framework. Infrastructure monitoring, alerting, reporting. Extensive community plugin ecosystem

competitors.name: Checkmk
competitors.keyDifference: Full-featured platform requiring dedicated infrastructure; ServerMonitor is lighter-weight focused on Windows server fleets and DB2
competitors.notes: Evolved from Nagios. Built-in agent deployment, SNMP, auto-discovery, dashboards. 1-2GB RAM requirement. Pre-built dashboards

competitors.name: Icinga
competitors.keyDifference: Linux-centric requiring assembly of modules; ServerMonitor is Windows-native with tray agent optimized for Windows Server and DB2
competitors.notes: Enterprise open-source monitoring for servers, networks, Kubernetes, Windows. Modular architecture (Icinga 2, Icinga Web, Icinga DB)

competitors.name: Prometheus + Grafana
competitors.keyDifference: Requires multiple services, custom DB2 exporters, and is pull-based; ServerMonitor is push-based via tray agents with DB2 built in
competitors.notes: CNCF-graduated metrics system (Prometheus) with visualization (Grafana). PromQL querying, cloud-native/Kubernetes focused
